ocr.description: MCP OCR Server - Extract text from images using Tesseract OCR. Supports local files, URLs, and image bytes. Dynamically built Docker image from mcp-ocr PyPI package.

pdf-reader.description: MCP PDF Reader Server - Extract text from PDF files using @sylphx/pdf-reader-mcp. Supports PDF URLs via sources array. Dynamically built Docker image from npm package.

builtwith.description: MCP BuiltWith Server - Identify technology stack behind websites using BuiltWith API. Provides domain lookup to discover frameworks, analytics tools, hosting services, and more. Published Docker image from hackerdogs Docker Hub.

pagespeed.description: MCP PageSpeed Server - Perform comprehensive web performance analysis using Google PageSpeed Insights API. Provides performance metrics, Core Web Vitals, SEO analysis, accessibility audits, and best practices assessment. API key is optional (can be passed as tool parameter or via --env PAGESPEED_API_KEY). Published Docker image from hackerdogs Docker Hub.
